name: nddev-builder
description: Create and validate native Codex skills, plugins, marketplaces, agents, hooks, MCP servers, app mappings, configuration, instructions, execpolicy rules, and managed requirements.

interface.shortDescription: Create and validate native Codex artifacts
interface.longDescription: A skills-first toolkit with conservative generators, deterministic static checkers, official runtime validation guidance, and no copied slash-command surface.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use NDDev Builder to create or validate a native Codex artifact.
